sections.paragraph:
Original: תּמל תּמול

Transliteration: temôl temôl

Phonetic: tem-ole'

BDB Definition:

  1. before, before that time, beforetime, heretofore, of late, of old, these days, time(s) past, yesterday, day before yesterday, recently, formerly
    1. yesterday
      1. recently, formerly (usual usage) (figuratively)
    2. as formerly, so more recently
    3. from yesterday, already

Origin: probably for H865

TWOT entry: 2521

Part(s) of speech: Adverb
